title: HOUSEGADS Tea Towels 100% Cotton Bar Towels Pack of 10 50 X 70 CM
features: Absorbent: These 100% cotton tea towels are highly absorbent,Measuring 50 cm x 70 cm making them perfect for drying dishes and wiping up spills.The durable cloth allows you to be a perfect alternative to all disposable items such as paper towels, wipes and tissues. The neat stitching along with faultless hems provides a perfect finish to each towel.

Lint-Free: The lint-free fabric ensures no unsightly lint is left behind on dishes or surfaces.An ideal addition to your kitchen to dry cookware, glassware, machinery, dishes, utensils, and other kitchen items. Also useful for wiping purposes such as bench cleaning, counter tops, appliances, food spills, table tops, duster for furniture, etc. One can also carry them as party supplies or picnic hamper.

Durable: Crafted from long-lasting materials, these towels can withstand repeated use and washing.These kitchen towels are equally useful to houses and hotels. Enjoy cooking, cleaning, baking, exhibit classy settings or avail it as tea time decorative towels. The aesthetic patterns can fit well in any space and serve diverse purposes without any compromise on grace.
Vibrant Colours: Available in a multi-coloured pack, these towels add a pop of colour to any kitchen. With a super soft feel, these towels provide a comfortable grip while cleaning.
Instructions:Tea towels set is machine washable and always give same new and refreshing look. It's best to wash them separately at 40c and tumble dry low. Do not use bleach or fabric softener.
description: Introducing the HOUSEGADS Tea Towels - a versatile and high-quality addition to your kitchen essentials. These 100% cotton tea towels are highly absorbent, ensuring they can tackle any spill or mess with ease. Crafted with a lint-free and long-lasting design, these towels are built to withstand frequent use in demanding environments like catering establishments or busy households. Boasting a super-soft texture, they provide a comfortable and gentle cleaning experience for your delicate dishes. The multi-coloured pack offers a vibrant and stylish touch to your kitchen decor. With their exceptional quality and practicality, these tea towels are a must-have for any modern kitchen. Measuring 50 cm x 70 cm, they offer ample surface area for efficient drying and cleaning. Upgrade your kitchen with the HOUSEGADS Tea Towels and experience unparalleled absorbency and durability.
